plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic page.ai run because the cached selector (combobox for 'Select your occupation') was not found on the page. The page currently displays 'Age Group' radio buttons instead, indicating dynamic or shifting form fields.

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI Cache and Retry
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache and retry the run so that page.ai can dynamically identify and fill the 'Age Group' fields instead of using the cached 'Select your occupation' selector.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable Caching / Deterministic Mode for Dynamic Flows
remediationSteps.details: If this survey page rotates questions dynamically by design, deterministic caching should be disabled for this test to ensure it always evaluates the page dynamically.

plan.notes: The test uses a highly flexible page.ai instruction ('Fill out the all of the survey questions with fake data...'). It failed because it was running in DETERMINISTIC mode with a stale cache from a different question set. Clearing the cache will resolve the immediate failure.
